data.name: RefereesLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of referees from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the competition from the repository.

data.name: MissingEntitiesError
data.value: One or more Library entities are missing.

data.name: DatabaseRebuilt
data.value: The database is rebuilt again.

data.name: RefereeLevelsLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of referee levels from the repository.

data.name: RefereeJobTitlesLoadError
data.value: Failed to get a list of referee job titles from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionStatusesLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of competition statuses in the repository.

data.name: DetailedCompetitionStatusesLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of competition statuses and names from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataSaveError
data.value: Failed to save the competition to the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataCreateError
data.value: Failed to create the new competition in the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataRemoveError
data.value: Failed to remove the competition from the repository.

data.name: RefereeLevelFindError
data.value: Failed to find the referee level in the repository.

data.name: RefereeCreateError
data.value: Failed to create the new referee in the repository.

data.name: RefereeJobTitleFindError
data.value: Failed to find the referee job titles in the repository.

data.name: RefereeRemoveError
data.value: Failed to remove the referee from the repository.

data.name: UnknownError
data.value: Unknown Error. For more information, see the log file.

data.name: CompetitionStatusFindError
data.value: Failed to find the competition status in the repository.

data.name: DetailedCompetitionStatusFindError
data.value: Failed to find the detailed competitions status in the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataIsNull
data.value: The competition is missing.

data.name: CompetitionDataNotFound
data.value: The competition was not found in the repository.

data.name: ConductingOrganizationsLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of event organizers.

data.name: ConductingOrganizationsSetError
data.value: Failed to set a event organizers.

data.name: ConductingOrganizationCreateError
data.value: Failed to create the new event organizer.

data.name: ConductingOrganizationRemoveError
data.value: Failed to remove a event organizer.

data.name: DatabaseCreateError
data.value: Database creation error.

data.name: AppDirsCreateError
data.value: Failed to create the application directories.

data.name: LocalizingError
data.value: Localizing "{0}" view error.

data.name: SportEventsLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of sport events from the repository.

data.name: SportEventCreateError
data.value: Failed to create the new sport event in the repository.

data.name: DisciplineLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the discipline from the repository.

data.name: SportEventRemoveError
data.value: Failed to remove the sport event from the repository.

data.name: CompetitionDataListLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of competition from the repository.

data.name: DisciplinesLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of disciplines from the repository.

data.name: DisciplineGroupsLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of discipline groups from the repository.

data.name: DisciplineSubGroupsLoadError
data.value: Failed to retrieve the list of discipline subgroups from the repository.
